name: SouthGobi Resources Ltd.
description: SouthGobi Resources Ltd. is a Canadian-based integrated coal mining, development, and exploration company with its primary operations located in Mongolia. The company focuses on the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of metallurgical and thermal coal assets. Its flagship project is the Ovoot Tolgoi coal mine, which serves as a key source of coal for customers in China. Listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, SouthGobi Resources plays a significant role in the regional coal supply chain, leveraging its strategic location to facilitate cross-border trade and resource development.
